title: 3-in-1 Floor Magnifying Glass with Light and Stand,60 LED Large 7 Inch Magnifier with 5 Colour Modes & 4 Brightness,Dual Lens Design,Adjustable Floor Stand & Clamp for Reading,Crafts, Sewing
features: 【3-IN-1 VERSATILE DESIGN WITH STAND & CLAMP】: This floor magnifying glass offers ultimate flexibility with three setup options. Use the 2-segment adjustable floor stand for hands-free viewing at your preferred height—connect one or both segments as needed. Detach the magnifier and attach it to the included clamp for securing onto desks, tables, or workbenches. Whether you need a freestanding magnifying lamp or a space-saving clamped magnifier, this magnifying glass with stand adapts to any task.

【EXTRA LARGE 7 INCH DUAL MAGNIFICATION ANTI-GLARE LENS】: Enjoy a generous 7-inch viewing area with crystal-clear 10X main magnification and a 30X inset lens for inspecting tiny details—perfect for jewellery making, circuit board repair, or examining stamps and coins. This large magnifying glass features an anti-glare design that reduces eye fatigue during continuous close-focus work, making it ideal magnifying glasses for reading and for those with aging eyes or macular degeneration.

【60 LEDS WITH 5 COLOUR MODES & 4 BRIGHTNESS LEVELS】: Say goodbye to poor lighting. This illuminated magnifying glass with light features 60 high-quality, flicker-free LEDs with five adjustable colour temperatures (from warm to cool white) and four brightness settings. Customise the lighting perfectly for any activity—warm light for relaxing reading, cool bright light for detailed crafting or sewing. A true craft magnifying glass with light for hobbies that demand precision, these magnifying glasses with light deliver exceptional clarity.

【FLEXIBLE 9.5 INCH GOOSENECK & ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT】: The detachable magnifier connects to a 9.5-inch flexible gooseneck that bends and stays in any position, allowing you to direct light and magnification exactly where needed. The floor stand segments are easily adjustable, letting you set the perfect height for seated work at a desk or standing at a workbench—a practical desk magnifying glass with light that adapts to your workspace and grows with your needs.

【HEAVY-DUTY STABILITY WITH USB POWER】: Unlike lightweight alternatives, this floor magnifier features a solid metal base for rock-solid stability during close work. Powered conveniently via USB—plug into any USB port, power bank, or use the included adapter—so you can place it anywhere without hunting for wall sockets. Whether you need a large magnifying glass for reading or a dedicated craft magnifying glass with light, this magnifying glass with light and stand delivers reliable performance for all your projects.

【IDEAL GIFT FOR ALL AGES & OCCASIONS】: Perfect for seniors with low vision, hobbyists who love detailed work, or anyone who spends hours on close-up tasks like sewing, painting, or electronics repair. As a versatile magnifying glass with light and stand, it's an excellent choice among magnifying glasses for hobbies. This thoughtful magnifying glass with stand makes a practical and caring gift for Christmas, birthdays, or any occasion.
